headline: 3 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks Walking a Fine Line
summary: Wall Street has set ambitious price targets for the stocks in this article. While this suggests attractive upside potential, it’s important to remain skeptical because analysts face institutional pressures that can sometimes lead to overly optimistic forecasts.

headline: Parnassus Mid Cap Fund Exited Pool Corp. (POOL) Due to Sluggish Demand in the Pool Market
summary: Parnassus Investments, an investment management company, released the “Parnassus Mid Cap Fund” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The Q4 2025 marked the fund’s consecutive quarter of outperformance, returning 1.17% (net of fees) in the quarter, surpassing 0.16% return for the Russell Midcap Index. The performance was […]

headline: Here's What to Expect From Pool Corporation's Next Earnings Report
summary: Pool Corporation is scheduled to announce its fiscal first-quarter earnings soon, and analysts project a low single-digit increase in profit.

headline: Bear of the Day: Pool Corp (POOL)
summary: Pool Corp's (POOL) stock has been falling as demand for new pool construction has weakened, leading to high inventory levels.
